title: Narrative Ontology — Entry
description: One canonical record of a Dramatica concept (Class, Type, Variation, Element, Archetype, Character/Plot Dynamic, Storypoint, Quad, Dynamic-Pair, Signpost-slot, or meta Concept). Maps optionally to one NCP enum string. The single source of truth for narrative IDs across the four narrative skills.

kind.description: What category of narrative thing this entry represents. 'concept' covers meta-entries about structural slots (Crucial Element, Symptom, Focus, Direction).

canonical_label.description: The label tools render in JSON output. For the three resolved naming contradictions (OQ-resolved per the kickoff SPEC), the NCP enum string is canonical: 'Relationship Story', 'Influence Character', 'Problem-solving Style'.

provenance.description: Whether the entry comes from a Dramatica source file or from one of the six Extension files in dramatica-vocabulary/references/.

term_file.description: Pointer to the prose section: 'skills/.../references/<file>.md#<anchor>'. Optional but RECOMMENDED so nav.py can hand off to extract.py.

scenarios.description: Persona-scenario IDs from scenarios.json. Capped at 8 (M01 falsification trigger; if median > 5 across the corpus, the scenario-index contingency activates).

ncp_appreciation.description: OPTIONAL. Closest NCP enum string in the pinned ncp-schema. ABSENT (not null) for kinds with no NCP target: archetype, quad, dynamic-pair, concept. Approximately 60% of populated entries are partial.

ncp_appreciation_partial.description: REQUIRED iff ncp_appreciation is present. true means the NCP target is a Storypoint slot the Dramatica entry rolls up to (e.g. an Element appearing in 'MC Problem'); false means clean enum equality.

ncp_schema_min_version.description: OPTIONAL. Pinned NCP schema version this mapping was authored against.

dynamic_pair_id.description: RECOMMENDED for kind=element|variation when the canonical theory pairs the term with another. FORBIDDEN for kind=archetype|quad|dynamic-pair|concept|class|throughline. Reciprocity enforced by validate.py.

pair_member_a.description: REQUIRED iff kind=dynamic-pair. ID of one half of the pair. Reciprocity invariant: <pair_member_a>.dynamic_pair_id MUST equal <pair_member_b>'s id.

ktad_position.description: Knowledge / Thought / Ability / Desire position. RECOMMENDED for entries that participate in a Quad.

^aliases_[a-z]{2}$.description: Locale-specific alias list (ISO-639-1 suffix). Per OQ-A resolution, depth-1 flattened keys; nested 'aliases: { en: [...] }' is rejected.

^deprecated_aliases_[a-z]{2}$.description: Locale-specific deprecated alias list. Used to surface dated terms (e.g. 'Mental Sex' → 'Problem-solving Style', 'Male/Female problem-solving' deprecated).

allOf.description: kind=dynamic-pair MUST carry pair_member_a + pair_member_b; MUST NOT carry dynamic_pair_id.
Non-dynamic-pair kinds MUST NOT carry pair_member_a/b.
Forbidden kinds for dynamic_pair_id (archetype, quad, concept, class, throughline).
